pages.text: Curios is required. The mod adds custom slots: Hair, Hair Accessory, Head Accessory, Neck Accessory, Inner Clothes, Cloak, two Back Accessory slots, and three Waist Accessory slots.

$(br)Coffin uses the Back Accessory slot. Sneak-right-click an empty coffin on a tamed zombie or corpse to store it, then sneak-right-click again to release it. The coffin also renders on the player's back.
$(br)Flag also uses the Back Accessory slot.$(br2)Blindfold, Blindfold 2, and Straw Hat use the Head Accessory slot.

$(br)Jade Pendant, Zhenhun Bell, and Yinhun Gong use Waist Accessory slots. The jade pendant increases meditation speed. When holding a compatible tool, press V to cycle tools from waist slots into hand.
$(br)Daoist Robes are a chestplate cosmetic armor piece with their own armor texture.
